name: Spiced up Apple Cider Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften the butter and margarine.
2. Gradually add sugar, beating for 1 minute.
3. Add eggs one at a time, beating 1½ minutes after each egg.
4. Sift together flour, salt, baking powder, cloves, allspice, nutmeg, cinnamon, and vanilla.
5. Alternately mix the dry ingredients with the cider into the butter mixture.
6. Blend well and bake in a greased 10-inch tube pan at 235°F for 1½ hours.
Caramel Glaze:
Combine sugar, baking soda, margarine, buttermilk, corn syrup, and vanilla in a saucepan.
Bring to a rolling boil over low heat and continue boiling for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
